{{Quote|You seek a Bothan female named Nwilla Thar—Thal—well, ''Nwilla'' will do. Watch those Bothans. They're crafty.|Prefect Eugene Talmont|<ref name="AED" />}}
'''Nwilla Thar'lyat''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], attempted to discredit [[Eugene Talmont]] by providing an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] officer with details on his operations. She was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who was sent by Talmont to eliminate her.<ref name="AED" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nwilla Thar'lyat appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
